calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Paul Kevin Canady.
Dept. 514. Judge: Garrett L. Wong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:50 a.m.

Jody C. Weiner, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Steven J. Sattler, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Weiner and Sattler appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Paul Kevin Canady.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Fraud and Misrepresentation was filed on August 27, 2018.
Notice and Acknowledgment of Receipt of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents was signed by defendant Paul Kevin Canady on December 9, 2018.
Proof of Service of Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents was filed on December 11, 2018.
Settlement Agreement and Stipulation for Entry of Judgment was filed with the Clerk's Office on April 3, 2019.
Default as to defendant Paul Kevin Canady was entered on May 20, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Steven J. Sattler, and against the defaulted defendant Paul Kevin Canady, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $18,834.84.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $640.00.
Subtotal - $53,474.84.
Minus Credit - $1,350.00.

Total - $52,124.84.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 9:58 a.m.

Notice And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
